title: Licence Type
description: Per-tenant configuration row for a kind of licence/ticket the business tracks. Management toggles `active` to decide which types matter at the time — independent of any individual. Expiry reminders and gap alerts only consider active types. `code` mirrors licence.licence_type so config and held records share one vocabulary.

licence_type_id.description: Internal canonical ID. Generated on insert if not provided.

tenant_id.description: Owning tenant. Set automatically by context.

code.description: Canonical licence_type value this row configures (e.g. 'white_card', 'working_at_heights'). Must match licence.licence_type. Unique per tenant (enforced by migration).

label.description: Human-readable name shown in admin + alerts, e.g. 'White Card (Construction Induction)'.

active.description: Management toggle. When true, this type is tracked: it shows in the UI and drives expiry/gap reminders. When false, ignored. Defaults true.

has_expiry.description: Whether holders of this type carry an expiry date. False for non-expiring tickets (White Cards). When false, expiry reminders are suppressed for this type.
